title: Dispensing Diluted Phage to Agar Plates
author: Opentrons

steps.title: to fill for this run
steps.instruction: to fill for this run. * `Number of columns in each plate`: Specify the number of columns (1-

steps.title: in each agar plate to fill
steps.instruction: in each agar plate to fill. * `Number of rows in each plate`: Specify the number of rows (1-

steps.title: in each agar plate to fill
steps.instruction: in each agar plate to fill. * `P20 Multi-Channel Pipette Mount`: Specify which mount (left or right) to host the P20 multi-channel pipette. ---

steps.title: The P20 multi-channel pipette picks up...
steps.instruction: The P20 multi-channel pipette picks up tips equal to the number of rows specified by the user.

steps.title: The P20 aspirates 2
steps.instruction: The P20 aspirates 2.5ul*(number of plates) of diluted phage in column 1 of the Corning 360ul plate.

steps.title: The P20 dispenses into column 1...
steps.instruction: The P20 dispenses into column 1 of all of the agar plates up to the number of plates specified without touching the medium in each plate.

steps.title: Steps 1-3 are repeated up to...
steps.instruction: Steps 1-3 are repeated up to the number of columns specified by the user.
